Paragraph.Sentence: Extend the following sequence by giving the next two terms: 1, 9, 24, 46, 75, ...

response.feedback: The student got this item correct.

Sorry, that was incorrect. For problems like these, you need to find the pattern based on the differences between all the pairs of numbers. The pattern here was that the difference between each pair of numbers started at 8, then 7 was successively added to the difference. The correct numbers are 111 and 154.
The student got this item incorrect.
